inputs.label: Latitude (°)
inputs.businessContext: Geographic latitude of the location (positive for north, negative for south)

businessContext_i18n.en: Geographic latitude of the location (positive for north, negative for south)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumun coğrafi enlemi (kuzey için pozitif, güney için negatif)
businessContext_i18n.de: Geografischer Breitengrad des Standorts (positiv für Norden, negativ für Süden)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Latitude géographique du lieu (positive pour nord, négative pour sud)
businessContext_i18n.es: Latitud geográfica de la ubicación (positiva para norte, negativa para sur)

inputs.label: Elevation
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level in meters

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation above sea level in meters
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Meeresspiegel in Metern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Altitude au-dessus du niveau de la mer en mètres
businessContext_i18n.es: Elevación sobre el nivel del mar en metros

inputs.label: Average March Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Historical average temperature for March in Celsius

businessContext_i18n.en: Historical average temperature for March in Celsius
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mart ayı için Santigrat cinsinden tarihsel ortalama sıcaklık
businessContext_i18n.de: Historische Durchschnittstemperatur für März in Grad Celsius
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température moyenne historique pour mars en degrés Celsius
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura histórica promedio de marzo en grados Celsius

inputs.label: Proximity to Water
inputs.businessContext: Index indicating proximity to large water bodies (0 = far inland, 1 = coastal)

businessContext_i18n.en: Index indicating proximity to large water bodies (0 = far inland, 1 = coastal)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyük su kütlelerine yakınlığı gösteren indeks (0 = iç kesimler, 1 = kıyı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Index für Nähe zu großen Gewässern (0 = weit im Landesinneren, 1 = Küste)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de proximité des grandes masses d'eau (0 = loin des côtes, 1 = côtier)
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de proximidad a grandes masas de agua (0 = tierra adentro, 1 = costero)

inputs.label: Year Offset from 2000
inputs.businessContext: Number of years since 2000 to account for climate trends

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years since 2000 to account for climate trends
businessContext_i18n.tr: İklim eğilimlerini hesaba katmak için 2000 yılından bu yana geçen yıl sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre seit 2000 zur Berücksichtigung von Klimatrends
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années depuis 2000 pour tenir compte des tendances climatiques
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años desde 2000 para tener en cuenta las tendencias climáticas
